title: Backround Engine
body:
# Background Engine

This mod allows you to set your minecraft wallpaper in the main screen, server select screen and more. 

**It also supports animated gifs and not just images**

![Cat wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a1726ce714a3f5c5c1139170aa2278d2381527b.png)
_On top of all that you can also customise the splash text in the custom gui with the reload button in the top right corner_
